instruction: Building a tree step by step (step 4 of 6). So far you've drawn: ground, trunk, crown. Add the next part: circle (cx=50, cy=40, r=4, fill #e63946) with id "fruit-1".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <line id="ground" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="8" y1="112" x2="120" y2="112" />
  <rect id="trunk" fill="#6a3819" x="56" y="72" width="16" height="40" />
  <circle id="crown" fill="#3a9d5d" cx="64" cy="48" r="32" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <line id="ground" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="8" y1="112" x2="120" y2="112" />
  <rect id="trunk" fill="#6a3819" x="56" y="72" width="16" height="40" />
  <circle id="crown" fill="#3a9d5d" cx="64" cy="48" r="32" />
  <circle id="fruit-1" fill="#e63946" cx="50" cy="40" r="4" />
</svg>
